recipes.title: Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipes.description: Soft and chewy chocolate chip cookies that are perfect for any occasion
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C)
Mix flour, baking soda, and salt in a bowl
Cream butter and sugars until smooth
Beat in eggs and vanilla
Gradually blend in flour mixture
Stir in chocolate chips
Drop rounded tablespoons onto ungreased cookie sheets
Bake for 9-12 minutes until golden brown
Cool on baking sheet for 2 minutes before removing

recipes.title: Chicken Tikka Masala
recipes.description: Creamy and flavorful Indian curry with tender chicken pieces
ingredients: 1.5 lbs boneless chicken, cut into cubes
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt, lemon juice, and spices for at least 1 hour
Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat
Cook chicken until browned, about 5-7 minutes
Remove chicken and set aside
In the same pan, sauté onions until golden
Add garlic and ginger, cook for 1 minute
Add tomato sauce and simmer for 10 minutes
Return chicken to pan and cook for 10 more minutes
Stir in heavy cream and simmer for 5 minutes
Garnish with cilantro and serve with rice or naan

recipes.title: Margherita Pizza
recipes.description: Classic Italian pizza with fresh mozzarella, tomato sauce, and basil
instructions: Preheat oven to 475°F (245°C)
Roll out pizza dough on a floured surface
Transfer to a pizza stone or baking sheet
Spread tomato sauce evenly over dough
Arrange mozzarella slices on top
Drizzle with olive oil
Bake for 12-15 minutes until crust is golden
Remove from oven and top with fresh basil
Slice and serve immediately

recipes.title: Chilli chicken
recipes.description: Chilli Chicken is a popular Indo-Chinese dish made with marinated, fried chicken tossed in a spicy, tangy, and slightly sweet sauce along with onions and capsicum. It’s a restaurant-style starter loved for its crisp texture and bold flavors.
instructions:
Marinate the Chicken
In a bowl, add chicken pieces, egg, cornflour, all-purpose flour, pepper, ginger-garlic paste, soy sauce, and salt.

Mix well until chicken is evenly coated.

Let it rest for 10–15 minutes.

Fry the Chicken
Heat oil in a pan.

Deep fry or shallow fry the marinated chicken until golden brown and crispy.

Remove and keep aside.
